heading: Fees
label: 7114 Fees
text: The Secretary may prescribe by regulation reasonable fees for the inspection of and the issuance of a certificate, license, or permit related to small passenger vessels and sailing school vessels.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)711446:390a(b)Section 7114 allows the Secretary to prescribe reasonable fees for the issuance of a certificate of inspection, license, or registry, or permits related to small passenger vessels and sailing school vessels.
